description: CompositionWhite full sleeve shirt with navy blue and yellow checks, made of 100% cotton, has a chest pocket, H.D lee embroidered behind the collar, a full length buttoned placket, mid-sleeve buttoned flaps, cuffs with blue denim piping, and a curved hemlineFittingSlimWash careMachine wash in cold water inside out using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach or wringTumble dry or flat dry inside out in shadeWarm ironDo not iron on print/embellishmentsChecks that add immense style to your casual look is what lee brings into your life. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. The full sleeves are sure to keep the winter chill at bay, while you can roll them up for a casual touch. Pair it with denims or corduroys and funky footwear for casual looks.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight: 5'7"; Chest: 33"; Waist: 25"
